channel.title: GitHub QML Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of QML in GitHub

item.title: Swordfish90/cool-retro-term
item.description: A good looking terminal emulator which mimics the old cathode display...

item.title: catsout/wallpaper-engine-kde-plugin
item.description: A kde wallpaper plugin integrating wallpaper engine

item.title: yeyushengfan258/Win11OS-kde
item.description: Win11OS kde is a materia Design theme for KDE Plasma desktop.
